danger_signals.visual_form: Colored ghosts moving toward Pac-Man with animated chasing behavior
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate threat to player safety; contact results in loss of life

danger_signals.visual_form: Four distinct colored ghosts: red (Blinky), pink (Pinky), cyan (Inky), orange (Clyde)
danger_signals.meaning: Each ghost represents active threat with unique behavioral patterns and pursuit strategies

danger_signals.visual_form: Multiple ghosts cornering or positioning ahead of Pac-Man
danger_signals.meaning: Heightened danger; Pinky and Inky employ coordinated trapping tactics

danger_signals.visual_form: Ghosts moving faster across maze as levels progress
danger_signals.meaning: Rising difficulty and escalating threat level as game advances

safety_signals.visual_form: Large flashing energizer dots positioned at four corners of maze
safety_signals.meaning: Temporary vulnerability window; eating pellet inverts threat dynamic and allows ghost consumption

safety_signals.visual_form: Ghosts turn blue with dizzied expression; later flash white before reversion
safety_signals.meaning: Safe to approach and consume ghosts for bonus points; temporary invulnerability period

safety_signals.visual_form: Ghost eyes return to center box after consumption; Clyde flees when distant
safety_signals.meaning: Temporary relief from specific threats; fleeing ghost indicates reduced immediate danger from that entity

safety_signals.visual_form: Warp tunnels on maze sides; ghosts slow when entering/exiting
safety_signals.meaning: Escape route with momentary safety advantage through reduced ghost speed

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Center of maze; dot consumption pattern indicates player presence and progress

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Blue form when powered-down; white flash before reversion; eye-only form during regeneration
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Direct pursuer; maintains aggressive chase regardless of position

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Blue form when powered-down; white flash before reversion; eye-only form during regeneration
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Positioning strategist; moves to intercept Pac-Man ahead of current position

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Blue form when powered-down; white flash before reversion; eye-only form during regeneration
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Cornering specialist; coordinates with other ghosts to trap player

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Blue form when powered-down; white flash before reversion; eye-only form during regeneration
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Distance-responsive entity; switches between chase and flee based on proximity to Pac-Man

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ghosts display natural colors (red, pink, cyan, orange); standard animated movement patterns
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Each ghost exhibits distinct AI behavior - Blinky pursues directly, Pinky/Inky intercept, Clyde distance-toggles

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: All ghosts turn blue with dizzied/confused expression; visual state change signals vulnerability window
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Ghosts reverse direction; movement becomes avoidant; Pac-Man becomes predator; ghosts can be consumed for points

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Blue ghosts flash white before reverting to original colors
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Ghosts return to aggressive AI patterns; threat returns to normal state

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ghost becomes eyes-only form; eyes navigate back to center regeneration box
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Temporary removal of ghost threat; eyes demonstrate resurrection mechanic through visual navigation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Fruit icons appear at bottom of screen indicating level; ghosts increase speed; power pellet duration decreases
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Escalating difficulty; longer power-down cooldowns; faster pursuit patterns

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Life count at bottom left depleted; final ghost contact triggers state change

environmental_storytelling.example: Enclosed maze design with specific ghost spawn location (center box) creates consistent threat geography; warp tunnels provide escape routes that ghosts must navigate with reduced speed
Player's consumption of dots visually demonstrates territory control and advancement toward level completion; bonus items appear under center box when threshold reached

environmental_storytelling.technique: Power Pellet placement as strategic resource
environmental_storytelling.example: Four corner-positioned power pellets create safe zones and tactical inversion points; their placement encourages defensive positioning and risk-taking
Inter-level cutscenes feature Pac-Man and Blinky in humorous/comical situations, establishing character personality and relationship narrative between player character and primary antagonist
Score display (top), life count (bottom left), and fruit level icons (bottom right) communicate ongoing game state without breaking visual immersion

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Direct chase toward Pac-Man regardless of positioning; primary aggressor
Attempts to position ahead of Pac-Man through predictive movement; cornering specialist
Coordinates with other ghosts to create trap scenarios; positioning based on interception patterns
Chases when far from Pac-Man; flees when close; toggles behavior based on proximity calculation
Reverses direction; exhibits dizzied expression; attempts to flee from Pac-Man; becomes consumable target
Eyes-only form navigates to center box; represents resurrection mechanic; no threat during transit
Movement speed reduces significantly when entering/exiting warp tunnels; creates brief safety window

notes: Pac-Man (Tengen NES port, 1990) maintains core visual communication from original 1980 arcade design. Game employs simple but effective color-coded faction system where protagonist (yellow) is visually distinct from four antagonistic ghosts with unique color identities. Danger communication relies on ghost proximity, color state changes, and behavioral patterns. Safety signals are primarily the power pellet mechanic (visual: large flashing dots) which inverts threat through ghost color change to blue. World-state changes are communicated through visual transformations (normal colors to blue, blue to white flash to reversion) paired with behavioral AI shifts. No political/faction conflict in traditional sense; instead, the game presents predator-prey dynamic that inverts through power-up mechanics. Environmental storytelling uses maze geometry, dot depletion, and UI placement to reinforce game state and progression. The design exemplifies efficient visual communication of game state through minimal but expressive visual vocabulary.
sources_used: wikipedia - Pac-Man article (Gameplay section covering ghost behaviors, power pellets, visual indicators, and level progression)
